title: Digital Frontier
description: Digital Frontier is a mod aimed at bringing a variety of computer-themed additions to the world of Minecraft, including multiple additions from the TRON franchise.
body:
# Digital Frontier
Digital Frontier aims to add a variety of computer themed elements to the game, including a new dimension inspired by the TRON franchise.

## Dimensions
Multiple new dimensions are available for the player to explore.

### The Digital Frontier
The Digital Frontier dimension is a host to a variety of structures and npcs called Programs that the player can interact with.  There is a single Digital Frontier instance per world.  This is an analog for the GRID from Tron. (Still in Development)

### User-Customized Dimensions
The User will be able to create and modify their own dimensions and the programs that inhabit them.  (Still in Development)

## NPCs
The NPCs that inhabit the new dimensions are called Programs.  They are randomly generated, although there are a few unique variants that will spawn into specific structures and provide the player with interaction opportunities

## Vehicles
This mod will add multiple new vehicles to the game.  Notably, the famouse Light Cycles will be available for the player to ride.  These are still in development, but currently playable.

Other vehicles planned include:
- Old-School light cycles
- Light Runner
- Recognizer
